summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of CareerPilot AI. 18/18 backend pytest tests pass (auth, profile, resume, careers, skill-gap, roadmap, courses, jobs, portfolio, trends, salary, interview, SSE chat stream, progress). Frontend landing + all auth-gated routes (dashboard, profile, resume, careers, skills, roadmap, courses, jobs, chat, interview, portfolio, trends) load successfully behind session_token cookie. All advertised data-testid hooks present and functional.

minor.issue: Endpoint signature uses Dict[str, str] so 'months' must be a string. Currently the frontend converts via String(months) so it works, but the contract is fragile—any client sending months as int gets 422. Recommend using a Pydantic model or Dict[str, Any] and coercing months to int server-side.
Bogus session_id returns 401 as expected, but error detail surfaces 'Invalid Emergent session'. Consider rate-limiting since this endpoint hits an external service.

ui_bugs.issue: Hydration warning: <span> rendered inside <option>. Caused by an inline expression in <option> children. While dev-only it can leak into prod console errors. Wrap option text without dynamic span injection.
Long category labels on the 'Trending Tech (Momentum)' BarChart overlap each other and become unreadable (see screenshot). Increase YAxis width or rotate/truncate labels.

No loading skeleton/spinner while /api/trends (10-30s Gemini call) is in flight; page shows only the title and stays blank. Same pattern likely affects other AI-driven pages. Add a Skeleton/loading state.

issues: Bar chart labels overlap on left axis
No loading indicator during 10-30s AI call

action_items: Optional: relax /api/roadmap/generate payload typing or coerce months on the server so non-string clients don't 422.
Optional: fix Roadmap.jsx <option> children to remove the injected <span> hydration warning.
Optional: add loading skeletons for AI-driven pages (Trends, Careers, Skill Gap, Roadmap, Salary, Interview) since Gemini calls take 10-30s.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~780 lines and houses every concern (auth, AI, jobs, portfolio, etc.). Split into routers/modules (auth.py, ai.py, jobs.py, interview.py) to stay under the 700-line guideline.
Repeated _gemini_json + LlmChat instantiation pattern across 7+ handlers — extract a helper that constructs the chat with a one-line system + user prompt.

Several endpoints accept untyped Dict[str, str]/Dict[str, Any] payloads (skill_gap, roadmap_generate, roadmap_toggle, portfolio_analyze). Replace with explicit Pydantic models for validation + OpenAPI docs.
auth_google_session: no existing-session de-dup; the same session_token can be inserted multiple times if the user logs in repeatedly. Use upsert on session_token.
Cookie set with secure=True + samesite='none' is correct for the preview origin, but app does not honor HTTPS-only env toggle for local dev—fine for now but flag for future.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of advertised data-testid hooks present; all routes render

test_credentials: Mock session created in MongoDB per /app/auth_testing.md. session_token used: test_session_1781188624459, user_id: user_test_1781188624459 (left in DB; subsequent agents may reuse or rotate).
seed_data_creation: Inserted one TEST_ user + session into MongoDB collections users / user_sessions for auth-gated tests. Pytest fixture auto-creates a fresh user per session and cleans up users/sessions/resumes/career_recommendations/skill_gaps/roadmaps/portfolios/interviews/chat_messages on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. To rerun: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` (takes ~60s including Gemini calls). For frontend manual checks, set cookie session_token=<value> with httpOnly secure sameSite=None on career-pilot-14.preview.emergentagent.com; create a fresh session in MongoDB via the playbook in /app/auth_testing.md if the existing one expires. Trends page needs >30s wait for first paint due to Gemini call.
rca_of_the_issue: Only minor issue surfaced: POST /api/roadmap/generate returned 422 when 'months' sent as int. RCA: endpoint signature `payload: Dict[str, str]` forces all values to strings. Frontend already wraps with String(months) (see /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js line 37), so end-to-end works. Fix in test was to pass months as string; recommended permanent fix is to define `class RoadmapIn(BaseModel): role: str; months: int = 6` and accept int directly.
